event_description: User opened the command palette search overlay.
User clicked on a result returned from the command palette search.
User clicked the hero search bar on the homepage to open the search palette.
User clicked on a reference directory card on the homepage.
User clicked a related resource link within a Common API Scenario card on the homepage.
User navigated to a developer guide detail page (top of guides content funnel).
User clicked the official website link on an API tool reference page.
User clicked the official specification website link on a specification detail page.
